parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT execution_id
     FROM `phi_prod.workflow_execution_log`
     WHERE DATE(started_at) = CURRENT_DATE()
       AND status = 'SUCCESS'
       AND phase = 'INGESTION'
     ORDER BY started_at DESC
     LIMIT 1),
    CONCAT('FALLBACK-', FORMAT_DATE('%Y%m%d', CURRENT_DATE()), '-', GENERATE_UUID())
  ) AS execution_id

INSERT INTO `phi_prod.workflow_execution_log`
(execution_id, execution_date, phase, status, is_reprocessing, records_processed, started_at)
VALUES
('{{ $('Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje').first().json.execution_id }}',
 CURRENT_DATE(), 'INGESTION', 'RUNNING', FALSE, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP());

MERGE `phi_prod.workflow_execution_log` AS target
USING (
  SELECT
    '{{ $('Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje').first().json.execution_id }}' AS execution_id,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `project-0e7c58d4-656f-49e8-807.phi_prod.raw_campaign_data`
     WHERE execution_id = '{{ $('Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje').first().json.execution_id }}'
    ) AS total_records
) AS source
ON target.execution_id = source.execution_id
WHEN MATCHED THEN
  UPDATE SET status = 'SUCCESS', finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), records_processed = source.total_records;

MERGE `phi_prod.workflow_execution_log` AS target
USING (SELECT '{{ $("Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje").first().json.execution_id }}' AS execution_id) AS source
ON target.execution_id = source.execution_id AND target.phase = 'INGESTION'
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET status = 'FAILED', finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),
  error_message = SUBSTR('{{ $json["message"] ?? "Erro desconhecido na Ingest�o" }}', 1, 1000);

INSERT INTO `phi_prod.workflow_execution_log`
(execution_id, execution_date, phase, status, is_reprocessing, started_at)
VALUES
('{{ $("Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje").first().json.execution_id }}',
 CURRENT_DATE(), 'CALCULATION', 'RUNNING', FALSE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP());

MERGE `phi_prod.workflow_execution_log` AS target
USING (
  SELECT
    '{{ $('Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje').first().json.execution_id }}' AS execution_id,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `project-0e7c58d4-656f-49e8-807.phi_prod.phi_score_history`
     WHERE execution_id = '{{ $('Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje').first().json.execution_id }}'
       AND calculation_status = 'SUCCESS') AS total_records
) AS source
ON  target.execution_id = source.execution_id
AND target.phase        = 'CALCULATION'
WHEN MATCHED THEN
  UPDATE SET
    status            = 'SUCCESS',
    finished_at       = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),
    records_processed = source.total_records;

MERGE `phi_prod.workflow_execution_log` AS target
USING (
  SELECT '{{ $('Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje').first().json.execution_id }}' AS execution_id
) AS source
ON  target.execution_id = source.execution_id
AND target.phase        = 'CALCULATION'
WHEN MATCHED THEN
  UPDATE SET
    status        = 'FAILED',
    finished_at   = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),
    error_message = SUBSTR('{{ $json["message"] ?? "Erro desconhecido na Fase 2" }}', 1, 1000);

INSERT INTO `phi_prod.workflow_execution_log`
(execution_id, execution_date, phase, status, is_reprocessing, started_at)
VALUES
('{{ $("Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje").first().json.execution_id }}',
 CURRENT_DATE(), 'OPERATIONAL', 'RUNNING', FALSE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP());

-- ============================================================
-- PHIT v1.3 - Buscar Campanhas Alertas
-- CORRE��O: business_model vem de model_config, n�o client_config
-- ============================================================

WITH

datas_recentes AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT calculated_date
  FROM phi_prod.phi_score_history
  WHERE calculation_status = 'SUCCESS'
  ORDER BY calculated_date DESC
  LIMIT 2
),

alertas_por_dia AS (
  SELECT
    h.client_id,
    h.campaign_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT h.calculated_date) AS dias_em_alerta
  FROM phi_prod.phi_score_history h
  INNER JOIN datas_recentes d
    ON h.calculated_date = d.calculated_date
  WHERE h.phi_classification IN ('CRITICAL', 'WARNING')
    AND h.calculation_status = 'SUCCESS'
  GROUP BY h.client_id, h.campaign_id
),

campanhas_confirmadas AS (
  SELECT client_id, campaign_id
  FROM alertas_por_dia
  WHERE dias_em_alerta >= 2
),

score_atual AS (
  SELECT
    s.execution_id,
    s.client_id,
    s.campaign_id,
    s.calculated_date,
    s.phi_value,
    s.phi_classification,
    s.priority_score,
    s.miv,
    s.mas,
    s.tss,
    s.fis,
    s.es,
    s.rs,
    s.os,
    s.threshold_used,
    s.mas_janela
  FROM phi_prod.phi_score_current s
  INNER JOIN campanhas_confirmadas c
    ON s.client_id   = c.client_id
    AND s.campaign_id = c.campaign_id
  WHERE s.execution_id = '{{ $('Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje').first().json.execution_id }}'
)

SELECT
  sa.execution_id,
  sa.client_id,
  sa.campaign_id,
  sa.calculated_date,
  sa.phi_value,
  sa.phi_classification,
  sa.priority_score,
  sa.miv,
  sa.mas,
  sa.tss,
  sa.fis,
  sa.es,
  sa.rs,
  sa.os,
  sa.threshold_used,
  sa.mas_janela,
  cc.client_slug,
  cc.primary_metric_type,
  mc.business_model,              -- ? vem de model_config via JOIN
  CASE
    WHEN STARTS_WITH(sa.campaign_id, 'GADS-') THEN 'GOOGLE ADS'
    WHEN STARTS_WITH(sa.campaign_id, 'META-') THEN 'META ADS'
    ELSE 'GOOGLE ADS'
  END AS plataforma
FROM score_atual sa
INNER JOIN phi_prod.client_config cc
  ON sa.client_id = cc.client_id
  AND cc.is_active = TRUE
INNER JOIN phi_prod.model_config mc    -- ? JOIN adicional
  ON cc.model_id = mc.model_id
  AND mc.valid_until IS NULL           -- ? modelo vigente
ORDER BY sa.priority_score DESC;

-- ============================================================
-- PHIT v1.3 - Verificar Escalada
-- Retorna tarefas abertas que devem ser escaladas:
-- Campanha em WARNING/CRITICAL por 2+ dias com tarefa OPEN
-- Condi��o: campanha j� estava em alerta ANTES da abertura da tarefa
-- ============================================================

WITH datas_recentes AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT calculated_date
  FROM phi_prod.phi_score_history
  WHERE calculation_status = 'SUCCESS'
  ORDER BY calculated_date DESC
  LIMIT 2
),

dias_em_alerta AS (
  SELECT
    h.client_id,
    h.campaign_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT h.calculated_date) AS total_dias_alerta
  FROM phi_prod.phi_score_history h
  INNER JOIN datas_recentes d ON h.calculated_date = d.calculated_date
  WHERE h.phi_classification IN ('CRITICAL', 'WARNING')
    AND h.calculation_status = 'SUCCESS'
  GROUP BY h.client_id, h.campaign_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT h.calculated_date) >= 2
)

SELECT
  d.client_id,
  d.campaign_id
FROM dias_em_alerta d
WHERE d.campaign_id = '{{ $json.campaign_id }}'
  AND d.client_id   = '{{ $json.client_id }}';

propertyValues.textContent: =?? Escalada automática PHI - campanha em {{ $('Code Enriquecer Campanha').first().json.phi_classification }} por 2+ dias consecutivos. PHI Score: {{ $('Code Enriquecer Campanha').first().json.phi_value }}. Priority Score: {{ $('Code Enriquecer Campanha').first().json.priority_score }}.

propertyValues.selectValue: ={{ (() => { const ps = $('Code Enriquecer Campanha').first().json.priority_score ?? 0; if (ps >= 80) return 'Crítica'; if (ps >= 60) return 'Alta'; if (ps >= 40) return 'Média'; return 'Baixa'; })() }}

propertyValues.textContent: =?? Atualizado automaticamente PHI - PHI Score: {{ $('Code Enriquecer Campanha').item.json.phi_value }} ({{ $('Code Enriquecer Campanha').item.json.phi_classification }}). Priority Score: {{ $('Code Enriquecer Campanha').item.json.priority_score }}.

parameters.sqlQuery:
MERGE `phi_prod.workflow_execution_log` AS target
USING (
  SELECT
    '{{ $('Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje').first().json.execution_id }}' AS execution_id,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `phi_prod.phi_score_current`
     WHERE execution_id = '{{ $('Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje').first().json.execution_id }}'
       AND phi_classification IN ('CRITICAL', 'WARNING')) AS total_records
) AS source
ON  target.execution_id = source.execution_id
AND target.phase        = 'OPERATIONAL'
WHEN MATCHED THEN
  UPDATE SET
    status            = 'SUCCESS',
    finished_at       = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),
    records_processed = source.total_records;

MERGE `phi_prod.workflow_execution_log` AS target
USING (
  SELECT '{{ $('Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje').first().json.execution_id }}' AS execution_id
) AS source
ON  target.execution_id = source.execution_id
AND target.phase        = 'OPERATIONAL'
WHEN MATCHED THEN
  UPDATE SET
    status        = 'FAILED',
    finished_at   = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),
    error_message = SUBSTR('{{ $json["message"] ?? "Erro desconhecido na Fase 3" }}', 1, 1000);

SELECT
  phi_value,
  phi_classification,
  campaign_id,
  client_id,
  execution_id,
  priority_score,
  miv,
  mas, tss, fis, es, rs, os,
  threshold_used,
  mas_janela
FROM `phi_prod.phi_score_current`
WHERE execution_id = '{{ $("Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje").first().json.execution_id }}'

MERGE `phi_prod.phi_score_history` AS target
USING (
  WITH campanhas_exec AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
      '{{ $("Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje").first().json.execution_id }}' AS execution_id,
      '{{ $("Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje").first().json.source_execution_id }}' AS source_execution_id,
      r.client_id,
      r.campaign_id,
      r.primary_metric_goal,
      r.date AS reference_date,
      r.cost_7d,
      r.cost_3d,
      r.conversions_7d,
      r.conversions_3d,
      CASE
        WHEN STARTS_WITH(r.campaign_id, 'GADS-') THEN 'GOOGLE ADS'
        WHEN STARTS_WITH(r.campaign_id, 'META-') THEN 'META ADS'
        ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
      END AS plataforma,
      cc.primary_metric_type,
      mc.model_id,
      mc.business_model,
      mc.model_version,
      mc.mas AS peso_mas,
      mc.tss AS peso_tss,
      mc.fis AS peso_fis,
      mc.es AS peso_es,
      mc.rs AS peso_rs,
      mc.os AS peso_os,
      mc.threshold AS threshold_used
    FROM `phi_prod.raw_campaign_data` r
    INNER JOIN `phi_prod.client_config` cc
      ON r.client_id = cc.client_id AND cc.is_active = TRUE
    INNER JOIN `phi_prod.model_config` mc
      ON cc.model_id = mc.model_id AND mc.valid_until IS NULL
    WHERE r.execution_id = '{{ $("Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje").first().json.source_execution_id }}'
      AND r.ingestion_status = 'SUCCESS'
      AND r.date = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('America/Sao_Paulo'), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
  ),
  portfolio_cost AS (
    SELECT client_id, SUM(cost_7d) AS total_cost_7d
    FROM campanhas_exec GROUP BY client_id
  ),
  calc_components AS (
    SELECT c.*, pc.total_cost_7d,
      CASE
        WHEN c.conversions_7d > 0 AND c.primary_metric_goal > 0
          THEN LEAST(100.0, GREATEST(0.0,
            (c.primary_metric_goal / (c.cost_7d / c.conversions_7d)) * 100.0))
        WHEN c.conversions_7d = 0 THEN 0.0
        ELSE 50.0
      END AS mas,
      CASE
        WHEN c.conversions_7d > 0 AND c.conversions_3d > 0
          THEN LEAST(100.0, GREATEST(0.0,
            100.0 - ABS(
              (c.cost_3d / c.conversions_3d) - (c.cost_7d / c.conversions_7d)
            ) / (c.cost_7d / c.conversions_7d) * 100.0))
        ELSE 50.0
      END AS tss,
      CASE
        WHEN pc.total_cost_7d > 0
          THEN GREATEST(0.0, 100.0 - (c.cost_7d / pc.total_cost_7d * 100.0))
        ELSE 50.0
      END AS fis,
      50.0 AS es,
      50.0 AS rs,
      50.0 AS os,
      CASE
        WHEN c.conversions_7d > 0 AND c.primary_metric_goal > 0
          THEN (c.cost_7d / c.conversions_7d - c.primary_metric_goal) * c.conversions_7d
        ELSE 0.0
      END AS miv
    FROM campanhas_exec c
    INNER JOIN portfolio_cost pc ON c.client_id = pc.client_id
  ),
  calc_phi AS (
    SELECT *,
      ROUND(
        (mas * peso_mas) + (tss * peso_tss) + (fis * peso_fis) +
        (es * peso_es) + (rs * peso_rs) + (os * peso_os), 2
      ) AS phi_value_raw,
      CASE
        WHEN total_cost_7d > 0 AND miv > 0
          THEN LEAST(100.0, GREATEST(0.0, miv / total_cost_7d * 100.0))
        ELSE 0.0
      END AS miv_normalizado
    FROM calc_components
  )
  SELECT
    execution_id,
    source_execution_id,
    client_id,
    campaign_id,
    reference_date AS calculated_date,
    business_model,
    model_id,
    model_version,
    phi_value_raw AS phi_value,
    ROUND(mas, 2) AS mas,
    ROUND(tss, 2) AS tss,
    ROUND(fis, 2) AS fis,
    ROUND(es, 2) AS es,
    ROUND(rs, 2) AS rs,
    ROUND(os, 2) AS os,
    threshold_used,
    ROUND(miv, 2) AS miv,
    ROUND(miv_normalizado, 2) AS miv_normalizado,
    ROUND((100.0 - phi_value_raw) * 0.60 + miv_normalizado * 0.40, 2) AS priority_score,
    CASE
      WHEN phi_value_raw >= 80 THEN 'EXCELLENT'
      WHEN phi_value_raw >= 60 THEN 'GOOD'
      WHEN phi_value_raw >= 40 THEN 'WARNING'
      ELSE 'CRITICAL'
    END AS phi_classification,
    'SUCCESS' AS calculation_status,
    'CORE' AS calculation_last_step,
    '7d' AS mas_janela,
    FALSE AS rs_data_insufficient,
    FALSE AS os_data_unavailable,
    plataforma,
    primary_metric_type,
    conversions_7d,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS snapshot_timestamp,
    FALSE AS reprocessed,
    CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP) AS reprocessed_at,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS reprocessed_by
  FROM calc_phi
) AS source
ON target.client_id = source.client_id
AND target.campaign_id = source.campaign_id
AND target.calculated_date = source.calculated_date
WHEN MATCHED AND target.reprocessed = FALSE THEN
  UPDATE SET
    execution_id = source.execution_id,
    source_execution_id = source.source_execution_id,
    business_model = source.business_model,
    model_id = source.model_id,
    model_version = source.model_version,
    phi_value = source.phi_value,
    mas = source.mas,
    tss = source.tss,
    fis = source.fis,
    es = source.es,
    rs = source.rs,
    os = source.os,
    threshold_used = source.threshold_used,
    miv = source.miv,
    miv_normalizado = source.miv_normalizado,
    priority_score = source.priority_score,
    phi_classification = source.phi_classification,
    calculation_status = source.calculation_status,
    calculation_last_step = source.calculation_last_step,
    mas_janela = source.mas_janela,
    rs_data_insufficient = source.rs_data_insufficient,
    os_data_unavailable = source.os_data_unavailable,
    snapshot_timestamp = source.snapshot_timestamp
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
  INSERT (
    execution_id, source_execution_id, client_id, campaign_id, calculated_date,
    business_model, model_id, model_version,
    phi_value, mas, tss, fis, es, rs, os, threshold_used,
    miv, miv_normalizado, priority_score, phi_classification,
    calculation_status, calculation_last_step, mas_janela,
    rs_data_insufficient, os_data_unavailable,
    snapshot_timestamp, reprocessed, reprocessed_at, reprocessed_by
  )
  VALUES (
    source.execution_id, source.source_execution_id, source.client_id, source.campaign_id, source.calculated_date,
    source.business_model, source.model_id, source.model_version,
    source.phi_value, source.mas, source.tss, source.fis,
    source.es, source.rs, source.os, source.threshold_used,
    source.miv, source.miv_normalizado, source.priority_score, source.phi_classification,
    source.calculation_status, source.calculation_last_step, source.mas_janela,
    source.rs_data_insufficient, source.os_data_unavailable,
    source.snapshot_timestamp, source.reprocessed, source.reprocessed_at, source.reprocessed_by
  );

INSERT INTO `phi_prod.workflow_execution_log`
(execution_id, execution_date, phase, status, started_at, error_message)
VALUES
('{{ $('Buscar ID de Sucesso Hoje').first().json.execution_id }}',
 CURRENT_DATE(),
 'OPERATIONAL',
 'WARNING',
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),
 SUBSTR(CONCAT('Campanha BQ sem mapeamento Notion: ', '{{ $json.campaign_id }}', ' | client_id: ', '{{ $json.client_id }}'), 1, 1000));
